languages.text: "Скрижали, что говорят через вечность". {n}Эоганн жадно всматривается, словно желая впитать в себя каждую черту, мерцающую в черном металле.{/n} "Тайны, что они скрывают в себе, зловещи, но несут истину сквозь эоны лет. Сознаете ли вы, Вольный Торговец, что лишь единицы из ныне живущих постигли подобное? Знание, заточенное в сем вместилище, подобно обоюдоострому ланцету".

"The tablets that speak through eternity." {n}Eogunn gazes greedily, as if desperate to absorb every detail shimmering in the black metal.{/n} "The secrets they conceal within themselves are sinister, yet they carry the truth across aeons. Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."
languages.original_text: "Скрижали, что говорят через вечность". {n}Эоганн жадно всматривается, словно желая впитать в себя каждую черту, мерцающую в черном металле.{/n} "Тайны, что они скрывают в себе, зловещи, но несут истину сквозь эоны лет. Сознаете ли вы, Вольный Торговец, что лишь единицы из ныне живущих постигли подобное? Знание, заточенное в сем вместилище, подобно обоюдоострому ланцету".

Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

languages.text: «Las tablas que hablan eternamente». {n}Los ojos de Eogunn brillan, avariciosos, como si buscaran devorar hasta el último detalle del metal negro.{/n} «Encierran secretos siniestros, pero transmiten sus verdades a través de los eones. Comerciante Independiente, ¿se da cuenta de los pocos seres vivos que han experimentado esto? El conocimiento sepultado aquí es como una lanceta de doble filo».
languages.original_text: "The tablets that speak through eternity." {n}Eogunn gazes greedily, as if desperate to absorb every detail shimmering in the black metal.{/n} "The secrets they conceal within themselves are sinister, yet they carry the truth across aeons. Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

traits.locale_text: «Las tablas que hablan eternamente». {n}Los ojos de Eogunn brillan, avariciosos, como si buscaran devorar hasta el último detalle del metal negro.{/n} «Encierran secretos siniestros, pero transmiten sus verdades a través de los eones. Comerciante Independiente, ¿se da cuenta de los pocos seres vivos que han experimentado esto? El conocimiento sepultado aquí es como una lanceta de doble filo».

languages.text: “这些历经万古仍在言说的石板。”{n}伊奥贡贪婪地凝视着那黑色金属，仿佛想将上面闪烁的每一处细节都刻入脑海。{/n}“它们潜藏的奥秘阴险邪恶，却跨越万古将真理传递至今。行商浪人，您意识到了吗？只有极少数在世之人有机会接触这样的事物。封存在其中的知识就像一把双刃剑。”
languages.original_text: "The tablets that speak through eternity." {n}Eogunn gazes greedily, as if desperate to absorb every detail shimmering in the black metal.{/n} "The secrets they conceal within themselves are sinister, yet they carry the truth across aeons. Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

traits.locale_text: “这些历经万古仍在言说的石板。”{n}伊奥贡贪婪地凝视着那黑色金属，仿佛想将上面闪烁的每一处细节都刻入脑海。{/n}“它们潜藏的奥秘阴险邪恶，却跨越万古将真理传递至今。行商浪人，您意识到了吗？只有极少数在世之人有机会接触这样的事物。封存在其中的知识就像一把双刃剑。”

languages.text: "Die Tafeln die durch die Ewigkeit sprechen." {n}Eogunn blickt gierig auf das schwarze Metall, als wolle er jedes darin schimmernde Detail in sich aufsaugen.{/n} "Die Geheimnisse, die sie verbergen, sind dunkel, tragen die Wahrheit aber durch Äonen. Ist Euch klar, dass dies zu erleben nur wenigen Lebenden vergönnt ist, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}? Das in diesem Gefäß begrabene Wissen gleicht einem zweischneidigen Skalpell."
languages.original_text: "The tablets that speak through eternity." {n}Eogunn gazes greedily, as if desperate to absorb every detail shimmering in the black metal.{/n} "The secrets they conceal within themselves are sinister, yet they carry the truth across aeons. Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

traits.locale_text: "Die Tafeln die durch die Ewigkeit sprechen." {n}Eogunn blickt gierig auf das schwarze Metall, als wolle er jedes darin schimmernde Detail in sich aufsaugen.{/n} "Die Geheimnisse, die sie verbergen, sind dunkel, tragen die Wahrheit aber durch Äonen. Ist Euch klar, dass dies zu erleben nur wenigen Lebenden vergönnt ist, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}? Das in diesem Gefäß begrabene Wissen gleicht einem zweischneidigen Skalpell."

languages.text: « Les tablettes qui parlent à travers l'éternité. » {n}Eogunn observe la dalle avec convoitise, comme s'il cherchait à assimiler les moindres détails chatoyant à la surface du métal noir.{/n} « Les secrets qu'elles abritent sont terribles, et pourtant, ils portent en eux la vérité immémoriale. Avez-vous conscience que, parmi les vivants, seuls de rares privilégiés ont eu la chance de faire une telle expérience, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ? Le savoir consigné là-dedans est pareil à un scalpel à double tranchant. »
languages.original_text: "The tablets that speak through eternity." {n}Eogunn gazes greedily, as if desperate to absorb every detail shimmering in the black metal.{/n} "The secrets they conceal within themselves are sinister, yet they carry the truth across aeons. Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

traits.locale_text: « Les tablettes qui parlent à travers l'éternité. » {n}Eogunn observe la dalle avec convoitise, comme s'il cherchait à assimiler les moindres détails chatoyant à la surface du métal noir.{/n} « Les secrets qu'elles abritent sont terribles, et pourtant, ils portent en eux la vérité immémoriale. Avez-vous conscience que, parmi les vivants, seuls de rares privilégiés ont eu la chance de faire une telle expérience, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ? Le savoir consigné là-dedans est pareil à un scalpel à double tranchant. »

languages.text: "Sonsuzlukta konuşan tabletler." {n}Eogunn, sanki siyah metalde parlayan her ayrıntıyı özümsemek istermiş gibi açgözlülükle bakıyor.{/n} "İçlerinde sakladıkları sırlar uğursuz ama yine de gerçeği çağlardır taşıyorlar. Hür Tacir, yaşayanlar arasında sadece seçilmiş birkaç kişinin bunu deneyimlediğinin farkında mısınız? Bu kaba gömülü irfan, iki tarafı keskin bir neştere benziyor."
languages.original_text: "The tablets that speak through eternity." {n}Eogunn gazes greedily, as if desperate to absorb every detail shimmering in the black metal.{/n} "The secrets they conceal within themselves are sinister, yet they carry the truth across aeons. Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."

traits.locale_text: "Sonsuzlukta konuşan tabletler." {n}Eogunn, sanki siyah metalde parlayan her ayrıntıyı özümsemek istermiş gibi açgözlülükle bakıyor.{/n} "İçlerinde sakladıkları sırlar uğursuz ama yine de gerçeği çağlardır taşıyorlar. Hür Tacir, yaşayanlar arasında sadece seçilmiş birkaç kişinin bunu deneyimlediğinin farkında mısınız? Bu kaba gömülü irfan, iki tarafı keskin bir neştere benziyor."

languages.text: 「永遠に語り継がれる錠剤」{n}エオグンは黒い金属に光るあらゆる細部を貪欲に注視する。{/n}「その中に秘められた秘密は邪悪だが、真実を時代を超えて伝える。この船に秘められた知識は、双刃のメスに似ていることを、ローグトレーダーは理解しているか？」
languages.original_text: "The tablets that speak through eternity." {n}Eogunn gazes greedily, as if desperate to absorb every detail shimmering in the black metal.{/n} "The secrets they conceal within themselves are sinister, yet they carry the truth across aeons. Do you realise, Rogue Trader, that only a select few among the living have experienced this? The knowledge entombed within this vessel is akin to a double-edged lancet."
